_source: Bailey & Lopez de Prado 2014 — The Deflated Sharpe Ratio §4 worked example
_computation_method: Closed-form evaluation of the DSR formula at the paper's published §4 inputs (SR=0.15748, N=100, T=1250, Var=0.001984, skew=-3, kurt=10) using Beasley-Springer-Moro Φ⁻¹ and Abramowitz-Stegun Φ. SR0 = √V·((1-γ_E)·Φ⁻¹(1-1/N) + γ_E·Φ⁻¹(1-1/(N·e))) yields 0.1127184049184799; σ_SR0 = √((1-γ₃·SR + (γ₄-1)/4·SR²)/(T-1)) yields 0.03497957643159601; z = (SR-SR0)/σ_SR0 = 1.279649431120278; DSR = Φ(z) = 0.899666 (6dp). Verified against pure-JS reference implementation in tests/learning.dsr-pbo.test.ts referenceDSR().
